holdings.infoBox: DLN is an equity ETF with a total of 308 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 3.74%, NVIDIA at 3.68%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 2.95%, Broadcom at 2.28%, and Apple at 2.24%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. LargeCap Dividend Fund (DLN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. LargeCap Dividend index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of the 300 largest dividend-paying US companies. DLN was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
